name: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah
overview: Bawang Putih lives with her stepmother and stepsister and is abused every day. Putih escapes and encounters the handsome Prince in the forest of Inderaloka.

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - Mira Filzah, Kamal Adli, Lisa Surihani
